title: Survival Analysis

prerequisites.text: Acceptance into Master's programs in Statistics & Data Science, Data Science or Biostatistics, and/or statistical background deemed sufficient by the Head of Department.

outline: This module covers advanced methods for the analysis of survival data, including: the Cox proportional hazards model; time-varying effects in the Cox model; parametric survival models; accelerated failure time model; frailty models; recurrent events models; competing risks models; extension of the Cox model for time-dependent variables; and joint models for longitudinal and time-to-event outcomes. Both the underlying theory and the application of these models using appropriate statistical software are covered.
assessment: Assignments 50%. Written exam 50%. Sub-minimum of 40% in each of assignment and examination component.
